---
title: "Clinical Notes Metadata Check"
author: "Dominick Lemas"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%m/%d/%Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************          Clinical Notes Metadata Check         
# **************************************************************************** #

# Author:      Dominick J. Lemas
# Project:     MOM-BABY EHR
# Purpose:     Check clinical-notes-metadata file before downstream NLP/data work.
#
# Checks:
#   1. Quantify notes from each site within each time period.
#   2. Check whether notes merge with mom-baby linkage file.
#   3. Create basic tables/figures for data review.

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)
```

```{r libraries}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************                  Libraries                    
# **************************************************************************** #

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(glue)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
```

```{r locate-repo-and-load-data}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************              Locate repo / paths              
# **************************************************************************** #

possible_roots <- c(
  getwd(),
  "C:/Users/djlemas/Documents/GitHub/ehr-database",
  "C:/Users/djlemas/OneDrive/Documents/ehr-database",
  "~/ehr-database",
  "~/GitHub/ehr-database"
)

working_dir <- NULL

for (p in possible_roots) {
  if (dir.exists(p)) {
    p_norm <- normalizePath(p, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)

    if (dir.exists(file.path(p_norm, "code")) || basename(p_norm) == "ehr-database") {
      working_dir <- p_norm
      break
    }
  }
}

if (is.null(working_dir)) {
  stop("Could not locate repo root. Set `working_dir` manually in this chunk.")
}

message("Using working_dir: ", working_dir)

# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************                 Input files                   
# **************************************************************************** #

metadata_rda <- file.path(
  working_dir,
  "data", "processed", "COMBINED",
  "clinical_notes_metadata_all_sites_20260506.rda"
)

linkage_rda <- file.path(
  working_dir,
  "data", "processed", "COMBINED",
  "mom_baby_link_all_sites_20260505.rda"
)

if (!file.exists(metadata_rda)) {
  stop("Metadata RDA does not exist: ", metadata_rda)
}

if (!file.exists(linkage_rda)) {
  stop("Linkage RDA does not exist: ", linkage_rda)
}

# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************                 Output files                  
# **************************************************************************** #

output_dir <- file.path(
  working_dir,
  "output",
  "clinical_notes_metadata_check"
)

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Options: "year", "quarter", "month"
time_period_unit <- "year"

# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************                 Load RDA data                 
# **************************************************************************** #

metadata_objs <- load(metadata_rda)
linkage_objs  <- load(linkage_rda)

message("Objects loaded from metadata RDA: ", paste(metadata_objs, collapse = ", "))
message("Objects loaded from linkage RDA: ", paste(linkage_objs, collapse = ", "))

notes_raw <- get(metadata_objs[[1]]) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

link_raw <- get(linkage_objs[[1]]) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

message("Metadata rows: ", nrow(notes_raw))
message("Linkage rows: ", nrow(link_raw))

names(notes_raw)
names(link_raw)
```

```{r helper-functions}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************              Helper functions                 
# **************************************************************************** #

pick_first_col <- function(df, candidates, required = TRUE, label = "column") {
  nm <- names(df)
  hit <- intersect(candidates, nm)

  if (length(hit) > 0) {
    return(hit[[1]])
  }

  if (required) {
    stop(glue(
      "Could not identify {label}. Tried: {paste(candidates, collapse = ', ')}\n",
      "Available columns: {paste(nm, collapse = ', ')}"
    ))
  }

  NA_character_
}

standardize_site <- function(x) {
  x <- str_to_upper(as.character(x))

  case_when(
    str_detect(x, "GNV|GAINESVILLE") ~ "GNV",
    str_detect(x, "JAX|JACKSONVILLE") ~ "JAX",
    str_detect(x, "ORL|ORLANDO") ~ "ORL",
    str_detect(x, "MIA|MIAMI") ~ "MIA",
    TRUE ~ x
  )
}

make_time_period <- function(date_var, unit = "year") {
  unit <- match.arg(unit, choices = c("year", "quarter", "month"))

  case_when(
    unit == "year" ~ as.character(year(date_var)),
    unit == "quarter" ~ paste0(year(date_var), " Q", quarter(date_var)),
    unit == "month" ~ format(date_var, "%Y-%m"),
    TRUE ~ as.character(year(date_var))
  )
}

outersect <- function(x, y) {
  union(setdiff(x, y), setdiff(y, x))
}
```

# 1. Standardize key variables

```{r standardize-columns}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************          Standardize key variables            
# **************************************************************************** #

notes_site_col <- pick_first_col(
  notes_raw,
  c("site", "site_id", "source_site", "data_site", "facility", "location"),
  required = TRUE,
  label = "notes site column"
)

notes_date_col <- pick_first_col(
  notes_raw,
  c(
    "note_date", "service_date", "encounter_date", "contact_date", "date",
    "delivery_date", "date_of_delivery", "admit_date", "created_date",
    "note_datetime", "note_dttm", "service_datetime"
  ),
  required = TRUE,
  label = "notes date column"
)

notes_type_col <- pick_first_col(
  notes_raw,
  c(
    "note_type", "note_set", "note_category", "clinical_note_type",
    "document_type", "doc_type", "type"
  ),
  required = FALSE,
  label = "notes type column"
)

notes_mom_id_col <- pick_first_col(
  notes_raw,
  c(
    "mom_part_id", "maternal_part_id", "mom_id", "maternal_id",
    "deidentified_mom_id", "mother_id", "part_id_mom", "mom_ehr_id"
  ),
  required = FALSE,
  label = "notes maternal ID column"
)

notes_baby_id_col <- pick_first_col(
  notes_raw,
  c(
    "baby_part_id", "infant_part_id", "baby_id", "infant_id",
    "deidentified_baby_id", "child_id", "part_id_baby", "baby_ehr_id"
  ),
  required = FALSE,
  label = "notes infant ID column"
)

notes_part_id_col <- pick_first_col(
  notes_raw,
  c("part_id", "participant_id", "patient_id", "person_id", "mrn", "deidentified_id"),
  required = FALSE,
  label = "notes participant ID column"
)

link_site_col <- pick_first_col(
  link_raw,
  c("site", "site_id", "source_site", "data_site", "facility", "location"),
  required = TRUE,
  label = "linkage site column"
)

link_mom_id_col <- pick_first_col(
  link_raw,
  c(
    "mom_part_id", "maternal_part_id", "mom_id", "maternal_id",
    "deidentified_mom_id", "mother_id", "part_id_mom", "mom_ehr_id"
  ),
  required = FALSE,
  label = "linkage maternal ID column"
)

link_baby_id_col <- pick_first_col(
  link_raw,
  c(
    "baby_part_id", "infant_part_id", "baby_id", "infant_id",
    "deidentified_baby_id", "child_id", "part_id_baby", "baby_ehr_id"
  ),
  required = FALSE,
  label = "linkage infant ID column"
)

notes <- notes_raw %>%
  mutate(
    site_std = standardize_site(.data[[notes_site_col]]),
    note_date_std = suppressWarnings(as_date(.data[[notes_date_col]])),
    time_period = make_time_period(note_date_std, time_period_unit),
    note_type_std = if (!is.na(notes_type_col)) as.character(.data[[notes_type_col]]) else "Unknown",
    mom_id_std = if (!is.na(notes_mom_id_col)) as.character(.data[[notes_mom_id_col]]) else NA_character_,
    baby_id_std = if (!is.na(notes_baby_id_col)) as.character(.data[[notes_baby_id_col]]) else NA_character_,
    part_id_std = if (!is.na(notes_part_id_col)) as.character(.data[[notes_part_id_col]]) else NA_character_
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    note_type_std = replace_na(note_type_std, "Unknown"),
    has_mom_id = !is.na(mom_id_std) & mom_id_std != "",
    has_baby_id = !is.na(baby_id_std) & baby_id_std != "",
    has_part_id = !is.na(part_id_std) & part_id_std != "",
    mom_merge_key = if_else(has_mom_id, paste(site_std, mom_id_std, sep = "__"), NA_character_),
    baby_merge_key = if_else(has_baby_id, paste(site_std, baby_id_std, sep = "__"), NA_character_),
    part_merge_key = if_else(has_part_id, paste(site_std, part_id_std, sep = "__"), NA_character_)
  )

linkage <- link_raw %>%
  mutate(
    site_std = standardize_site(.data[[link_site_col]]),
    mom_id_std = if (!is.na(link_mom_id_col)) as.character(.data[[link_mom_id_col]]) else NA_character_,
    baby_id_std = if (!is.na(link_baby_id_col)) as.character(.data[[link_baby_id_col]]) else NA_character_
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    has_mom_id = !is.na(mom_id_std) & mom_id_std != "",
    has_baby_id = !is.na(baby_id_std) & baby_id_std != "",
    mom_merge_key = if_else(has_mom_id, paste(site_std, mom_id_std, sep = "__"), NA_character_),
    baby_merge_key = if_else(has_baby_id, paste(site_std, baby_id_std, sep = "__"), NA_character_)
  )

column_map <- tibble(
  data_source = c("notes metadata", "mom-baby linkage"),
  site_col = c(notes_site_col, link_site_col),
  date_col = c(notes_date_col, NA_character_),
  note_type_col = c(notes_type_col, NA_character_),
  mom_id_col = c(notes_mom_id_col, link_mom_id_col),
  baby_id_col = c(notes_baby_id_col, link_baby_id_col),
  participant_id_col = c(notes_part_id_col, NA_character_)
)

kable(column_map)

write_csv(column_map, file.path(output_dir, "column_mapping.csv"))
```

# 2. Metadata overview

```{r metadata-overview}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************             Metadata overview                 
# **************************************************************************** #

overview_table <- notes %>%
  summarise(
    n_note_rows = n(),
    n_sites = n_distinct(site_std, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_note_date = min(note_date_std, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_note_date = max(note_date_std, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_note_types = n_distinct(note_type_std, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_unique_mom_ids = n_distinct(mom_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_unique_baby_ids = n_distinct(baby_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_unique_participant_ids = n_distinct(part_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_rows_with_mom_id = mean(has_mom_id) * 100,
    pct_rows_with_baby_id = mean(has_baby_id) * 100,
    pct_rows_with_participant_id = mean(has_part_id) * 100
  )

kable(overview_table, digits = 1)

write_csv(overview_table, file.path(output_dir, "clinical_notes_overview.csv"))
```

# 3. Notes by site and time period

```{r notes-by-site-time}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************       Notes by site and time period           
# **************************************************************************** #

notes_by_site_time <- notes %>%
  filter(!is.na(site_std), !is.na(time_period)) %>%
  count(site_std, time_period, name = "n_notes") %>%
  arrange(site_std, time_period)

kable(notes_by_site_time)

write_csv(notes_by_site_time, file.path(output_dir, "notes_by_site_time_period.csv"))

p_notes_site_time <- notes_by_site_time %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time_period, y = n_notes, fill = site_std)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Clinical notes by site and time period",
    x = str_to_title(time_period_unit),
    y = "Number of note rows",
    fill = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

p_notes_site_time

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "notes_by_site_time_period.png"),
  plot = p_notes_site_time,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

# 4. Notes by site, time period, and note type

```{r notes-by-type}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************      Notes by site, period, and type          
# **************************************************************************** #

notes_by_type <- notes %>%
  filter(!is.na(site_std), !is.na(time_period)) %>%
  count(site_std, time_period, note_type_std, name = "n_notes") %>%
  arrange(site_std, time_period, desc(n_notes))

kable(notes_by_type)

write_csv(notes_by_type, file.path(output_dir, "notes_by_site_time_period_type.csv"))

top_note_types <- notes %>%
  count(note_type_std, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 12) %>%
  pull(note_type_std)

p_top_note_types <- notes %>%
  filter(note_type_std %in% top_note_types) %>%
  count(site_std, note_type_std, name = "n_notes") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(note_type_std, n_notes), y = n_notes, fill = site_std)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Top clinical note types by site",
    x = "Note type",
    y = "Number of note rows",
    fill = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

p_top_note_types

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "top_note_types_by_site.png"),
  plot = p_top_note_types,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```

# 5. Missingness and duplicate checks

```{r missingness-duplicates}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************         Missingness and duplicate checks       
# **************************************************************************** #

missingness_table <- notes %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    missing_site = sum(is.na(site_std) | site_std == ""),
    missing_note_date = sum(is.na(note_date_std)),
    missing_time_period = sum(is.na(time_period)),
    missing_note_type = sum(is.na(note_type_std) | note_type_std == "" | note_type_std == "Unknown"),
    missing_mom_id = sum(!has_mom_id),
    missing_baby_id = sum(!has_baby_id),
    missing_participant_id = sum(!has_part_id)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(-n_rows, names_to = "field", values_to = "n_missing") %>%
  mutate(pct_missing = 100 * n_missing / n_rows) %>%
  arrange(desc(pct_missing))

kable(missingness_table, digits = 1)

write_csv(missingness_table, file.path(output_dir, "metadata_missingness.csv"))

note_id_col <- pick_first_col(
  notes_raw,
  c("note_id", "document_id", "doc_id", "clinical_note_id", "note_key", "file_name", "filename"),
  required = FALSE,
  label = "note ID column"
)

if (!is.na(note_id_col)) {
  duplicate_note_ids <- notes_raw %>%
    clean_names() %>%
    count(.data[[note_id_col]], name = "n") %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[note_id_col]]), n > 1) %>%
    arrange(desc(n))

  kable(head(duplicate_note_ids, 50))

  write_csv(duplicate_note_ids, file.path(output_dir, "duplicate_note_ids.csv"))
} else {
  message("No note/document/file ID column identified for duplicate note checks.")
}
```

# 6. Merge check with mom-baby linkage file

```{r merge-check}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************     Merge check with mom-baby linkage file     
# **************************************************************************** #

link_mom_keys <- linkage %>%
  filter(!is.na(mom_merge_key)) %>%
  distinct(mom_merge_key) %>%
  mutate(link_mom_match = TRUE)

link_baby_keys <- linkage %>%
  filter(!is.na(baby_merge_key)) %>%
  distinct(baby_merge_key) %>%
  mutate(link_baby_match = TRUE)

notes_merge_check <- notes %>%
  left_join(link_mom_keys, by = "mom_merge_key") %>%
  left_join(link_baby_keys, by = "baby_merge_key") %>%
  mutate(
    link_mom_match = replace_na(link_mom_match, FALSE),
    link_baby_match = replace_na(link_baby_match, FALSE),
    any_link_match = link_mom_match | link_baby_match,
    merge_status = case_when(
      link_mom_match & link_baby_match ~ "Matched by mom and baby ID",
      link_mom_match ~ "Matched by mom ID only",
      link_baby_match ~ "Matched by baby ID only",
      TRUE ~ "No linkage match"
    )
  )

merge_summary <- notes_merge_check %>%
  summarise(
    n_note_rows = n(),
    n_rows_any_link_match = sum(any_link_match),
    pct_rows_any_link_match = 100 * mean(any_link_match),
    n_rows_mom_link_match = sum(link_mom_match),
    pct_rows_mom_link_match = 100 * mean(link_mom_match),
    n_rows_baby_link_match = sum(link_baby_match),
    pct_rows_baby_link_match = 100 * mean(link_baby_match),
    n_unique_moms_in_notes = n_distinct(mom_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_unique_moms_matched = n_distinct(mom_merge_key[link_mom_match], na.rm = TRUE),
    n_unique_babies_in_notes = n_distinct(baby_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_unique_babies_matched = n_distinct(baby_merge_key[link_baby_match], na.rm = TRUE)
  )

kable(merge_summary, digits = 1)

write_csv(merge_summary, file.path(output_dir, "linkage_merge_summary.csv"))

merge_by_site_time <- notes_merge_check %>%
  filter(!is.na(site_std), !is.na(time_period)) %>%
  group_by(site_std, time_period) %>%
  summarise(
    n_note_rows = n(),
    n_rows_any_link_match = sum(any_link_match),
    pct_rows_any_link_match = 100 * mean(any_link_match),
    n_rows_no_link_match = sum(!any_link_match),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_std, time_period)

kable(merge_by_site_time, digits = 1)

write_csv(merge_by_site_time, file.path(output_dir, "linkage_merge_by_site_time_period.csv"))

p_linkage_status <- notes_merge_check %>%
  count(site_std, merge_status, name = "n_note_rows") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = site_std, y = n_note_rows, fill = merge_status)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Clinical note linkage status by site",
    x = "Site",
    y = "Number of note rows",
    fill = "Merge status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

p_linkage_status

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "linkage_status_by_site.png"),
  plot = p_linkage_status,
  width = 10,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

# 7. Participant-level merge summary

```{r participant-level-merge-summary}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************       Participant-level merge summary         
# **************************************************************************** #

participant_merge_summary <- notes_merge_check %>%
  group_by(site_std) %>%
  summarise(
    unique_moms = n_distinct(mom_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    matched_moms = n_distinct(mom_merge_key[link_mom_match], na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_moms_matched = if_else(unique_moms > 0, 100 * matched_moms / unique_moms, NA_real_),
    unique_babies = n_distinct(baby_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    matched_babies = n_distinct(baby_merge_key[link_baby_match], na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_babies_matched = if_else(unique_babies > 0, 100 * matched_babies / unique_babies, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_std)

kable(participant_merge_summary, digits = 1)

write_csv(
  participant_merge_summary,
  file.path(output_dir, "participant_level_merge_summary.csv")
)
```

# 8. Notes not merging with linkage file

```{r nonmatching-notes}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************              Non-matching notes               
# **************************************************************************** #

nonmatching_summary <- notes_merge_check %>%
  filter(!any_link_match) %>%
  count(site_std, time_period, note_type_std, name = "n_unmatched_notes") %>%
  arrange(site_std, time_period, desc(n_unmatched_notes))

kable(nonmatching_summary)

write_csv(nonmatching_summary, file.path(output_dir, "nonmatching_notes_summary.csv"))

nonmatching_notes_export <- notes_merge_check %>%
  filter(!any_link_match) %>%
  select(
    site_std,
    time_period,
    note_date_std,
    note_type_std,
    mom_id_std,
    baby_id_std,
    part_id_std,
    merge_status,
    any_of(names(notes_raw))
  )

write_csv(
  nonmatching_notes_export,
  file.path(output_dir, "nonmatching_notes_row_level.csv")
)

message(
  "Non-matching row-level file written to: ",
  file.path(output_dir, "nonmatching_notes_row_level.csv")
)
```

# 9. Linkage IDs with no matching notes

```{r linkage-without-notes}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************         Linkage IDs with no matching notes     
# **************************************************************************** #

mom_keys_in_notes <- notes %>%
  filter(!is.na(mom_merge_key)) %>%
  distinct(mom_merge_key)

baby_keys_in_notes <- notes %>%
  filter(!is.na(baby_merge_key)) %>%
  distinct(baby_merge_key)

linkage_without_mom_notes <- linkage %>%
  filter(!is.na(mom_merge_key)) %>%
  anti_join(mom_keys_in_notes, by = "mom_merge_key")

linkage_without_baby_notes <- linkage %>%
  filter(!is.na(baby_merge_key)) %>%
  anti_join(baby_keys_in_notes, by = "baby_merge_key")

linkage_without_notes_summary <- tibble(
  check = c("linkage moms without notes", "linkage babies without notes"),
  n_unique_ids = c(
    n_distinct(linkage_without_mom_notes$mom_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_distinct(linkage_without_baby_notes$baby_merge_key, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

kable(linkage_without_notes_summary)

write_csv(
  linkage_without_notes_summary,
  file.path(output_dir, "linkage_ids_without_notes_summary.csv")
)

write_csv(
  linkage_without_mom_notes,
  file.path(output_dir, "linkage_moms_without_notes.csv")
)

write_csv(
  linkage_without_baby_notes,
  file.path(output_dir, "linkage_babies_without_notes.csv")
)
```

# 10. Notes per participant

```{r notes-per-participant}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************             Notes per participant             
# **************************************************************************** #

notes_per_mom <- notes %>%
  filter(!is.na(mom_merge_key)) %>%
  count(site_std, mom_merge_key, name = "n_notes") %>%
  group_by(site_std) %>%
  summarise(
    n_moms = n(),
    median_notes_per_mom = median(n_notes),
    mean_notes_per_mom = mean(n_notes),
    p25_notes_per_mom = quantile(n_notes, 0.25),
    p75_notes_per_mom = quantile(n_notes, 0.75),
    max_notes_per_mom = max(n_notes),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

notes_per_baby <- notes %>%
  filter(!is.na(baby_merge_key)) %>%
  count(site_std, baby_merge_key, name = "n_notes") %>%
  group_by(site_std) %>%
  summarise(
    n_babies = n(),
    median_notes_per_baby = median(n_notes),
    mean_notes_per_baby = mean(n_notes),
    p25_notes_per_baby = quantile(n_notes, 0.25),
    p75_notes_per_baby = quantile(n_notes, 0.75),
    max_notes_per_baby = max(n_notes),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

kable(notes_per_mom, digits = 1)
kable(notes_per_baby, digits = 1)

write_csv(notes_per_mom, file.path(output_dir, "notes_per_mom_summary.csv"))
write_csv(notes_per_baby, file.path(output_dir, "notes_per_baby_summary.csv"))
```

# 11. Final checklist

```{r final-checklist}
# **************************************************************************** #
# ***************              Final checklist                  
# **************************************************************************** #

final_checklist <- tibble(
  check = c(
    "Metadata loaded",
    "Linkage loaded",
    "Notes have site information",
    "Notes have date/time-period information",
    "Notes have at least one ID type for linkage",
    "At least one note row merges to linkage",
    "Output directory created"
  ),
  status = c(
    nrow(notes) > 0,
    nrow(linkage) > 0,
    any(!is.na(notes$site_std) & notes$site_std != ""),
    any(!is.na(notes$time_period)),
    any(notes$has_mom_id | notes$has_baby_id | notes$has_part_id),
    any(notes_merge_check$any_link_match),
    dir.exists(output_dir)
  )
) %>%
  mutate(status = if_else(status, "PASS", "CHECK"))

kable(final_checklist)

write_csv(final_checklist, file.path(output_dir, "final_checklist.csv"))

message("All check outputs written to: ", output_dir)
```
